_purpose: Verifies the 1:1 join-link confirmation handshake (Phase 1 of the 1:1 SMS pivot). Pre-requisite: a join_link_submission row in 'pending' status for +15551310099 must already exist (use scripts/seed-join-submission.js). Sends YES from that phone 1:1 to Rally and asserts the participant is promoted to active.
_post_run_assertions: trip_session_participants has joiner with is_attending = true
outbound thread_messages includes the joinKickoffSms body for thread_id 1to1_+15551310099

messages._note: 1:1 YES from a phone with a live pending join_link_submission — should be promoted, not routed to existing session logic
